economic_notes: Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. is a wholly-owned enterprise accounted for using modified equity method (not consolidated). Construction of 9 housing units funded via CMHC Affordable Housing Fund. Construction of a shelter for women and children fleeing violence funded via CMHC SEP program.
notes: Qualified audit opinion on two grounds: (1) Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. (wholly-owned) not consolidated as required under PSAS — accounted for using modified equity method instead; (2) Asset retirement obligations under PS 3280 not identified or measured for March 31, 2023 and 2024. These are summary financial statements only — full departmental/segment revenue and expense breakdowns are not included in the text provided. ISC funding and government transfers breakdown not available in summary statements. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $2,919,239 to $7,373,392. CMHC loans totalling approximately $3,811,627 outstanding at year end (RRAP $73,925 + SEP $2,610,000 + AHF $1,127,702).
